**Which card or text**
e.g. "The Roux — reversed meaning", or the contact line.

**What it says now**
Paste the current wording.

**What it should say**
Your suggested fix.

> Most copy lives in `control_panel/`: card text in `cards.md`, on-screen words in `words.md`, and contact details in `settings.md` — no code needed to change it.
